arts.ttl: Real Betis want to sign Leeds’ Junior Firpo this Jan
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo is a January target for his former club Real Betis, who are eyeing a full-back that can bolster their Europa Conference League bid. It has led to a report from ABC Sevilla claiming that his former club Real Betis are eyeing a reunion this January, despite being able to agree a pre-contract signature with the 28-year-old to sign him in the summer for free.

arts.ttl: Leeds United chances tonight boosted with Norwich City having 10 ruled out
arts.sum: Leeds United are facing a seriously depleted Norwich City side this evening, as the Canaries head to Elland Road without several key players including Championship top scorer Borja Sainz. Johannes Hoff Thorup hasn’t been helped by significant injury setbacks of late, plus a lengthy suspension for his crucial goalscorer – confirming in his pre-match press conference that the same players ruled out against Sheffield United at the weekend are out tonight.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have 'win-win' transfer scenario with Wilfried Gnonto
arts.sum: "If a club from Saudi Arabia offered a barrel load of money, I think Leeds would be interested in taking the deal and potentially reinvesting it; or keeping it for FFP purposes. That being said, he's only started in one of their last six games in the Championship, which makes me wonder if he's no longer the number one for Daniel Farke, who already has lots of options in that area.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery gives “fantastic” Emi Buendia verdict, Leeds United surely alerted to new transfer comment
arts.sum: Leeds United are no doubt keeping a close eye on developments at Aston Villa with Emi Buendia, and after Unai Emery said he could leave the club this month, he handed him a Champions League start last night. Leeds were surely alerted last week when Aston Villa manager Unai Emery revealed that the Whites’ summer target Emi Buendia could be allowed a January exit.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer latest as striker truth emerges and Emi Buendia hint
arts.sum: There are just under two weeks of the transfer window remaining, and Leeds United are continuing to be linked with players who could make the difference in their push for automatic promotion this season. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Watch: Leeds’ Joe Gelhardt hits stunning Hull debut goal
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Joe Gelhardt made his debut for Hull City this week in a 2-1 defeat at home to QPR, but he netted a stunning first goal for the Tigers. One of those not available to Daniel Farke is Joe Gelhardt, who was sent out on loan to Hull City earlier in January.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: Daniel Farke's side rivalling Ajax for Championship playmaker?
arts.sum: Leeds United are allegedly one of four clubs who are contemplating whether to push for the signing of a Championship playmaker.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Norwich City
arts.sum: Goals from Manor Solomon, Largie Ramazani and Ao Tanaka earned a somewhat flattering scoreline, and Leeds will be hoping for more clinical finishing against the Canaries. However, both players are doubts for Wednesday night’s clash against Norwich, Solomon dealing with hamstring trouble again while Aaronson took a knock to his ankle during the game.

arts.ttl: Out-of-contract Leeds United regular attracting January interest
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo is being eyed by Real Betis as an easier alternative to Nottingham Forest’s… The post Out-of-contract Leeds United regular attracting January interest appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Upcoming five-week period could define Leeds United’s season
arts.sum: Having suffered promotion heartbreak last season, Leeds United have done well to mount another strong challenge in the Championship this term. The Whites are one of four teams vying to win automatic promotion to the Premier League alongside Sheffield United, Burnley and Sunderland.
